full_text:
Sima Jun (Zizang) 司馬駿 (子臧)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Jun (司馬駿), styledZizang (子臧). Friend to Cao Fang. A talented child who became a popular offical. Sima Jun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Sima Jun lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
